info.title: MarkOS API
info.description: Merged OpenAPI 3.1 specification for all MarkOS F-NN flow contracts. Generated from 64 flow contracts.

get.summary: RFC 8414 authorization server metadata (S256-only per D-05)

schema.required: [issuer, authorization_endpoint, token_endpoint, registration_endpoint, code_challenge_methods_supported, grant_types_supported, response_types_supported]

get.summary: RFC 9728 protected resource metadata
Literacy subsystem health check
Verify OTP token and provision org + tenant

post.summary: Issue authentication options for a user by user_id
Verify authentication assertion and establish session
Issue WebAuthn registration options (server-side challenge) for the current session's user
Verify registration attestation and persist credential

'201'.description: Magic link sent; user is buffered but no tenant created yet

get.summary: Read a tenant-safe unified CRM timeline

\"200\".description: Ordered activity rows with source_event_ref preserved

get.summary: List calendar entries for eligible CRM object families and approved date fields

\"200\".description: Calendar entries returned from canonical CRM records

patch.summary: Reschedule an eligible CRM record through the calendar mutation seam

\"200\".description: Calendar date updated with audit evidence

get.summary: List tenant-scoped companies
List tenant-scoped contacts
Get deterministic CRM grounding bundle

post.summary: Package a bounded copilot recommendation into approval review

\"403\".description: Mutation family or oversight scope forbidden

get.summary: List tenant-scoped deals
Return canonical stage counts, values, and weighted forecast totals from CRM records

\"200\".description: Funnel rollups returned for the active pipeline and filters

get.summary: List workspace-eligible canonical and custom object definitions

post.summary: Create or update object capability rules for the CRM workspace

get.summary: List tenant-owned pipeline families and ordered stages

post.summary: Create or update a tenant-owned pipeline definition with ordered stages

get.summary: Return deterministic attribution weights and revenue contribution rows for tenant CRM records

\"200\".description: Attribution rows returned with inspectable weights, readiness, and evidence lineage

get.summary: Return tenant-safe reporting readiness, freshness, productivity, and executive summary payloads

\"200\".description: Readiness and reporting payload returned from canonical CRM evidence

post.summary: Extract sources from raw scraped content

get.summary: Get literacy coverage report
MCP server metadata + tool list (public for discovery)

properties.tools: { type: object, properties: { listChanged: { type: boolean } } }

post.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 request. Bearer token required for tools/call + resources/*.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer <opaque_token> — required for tools/call + resources/* methods

'200'.description: JSON-RPC response envelope (success or JSON-RPC error)

WWW-Authenticate.description: Bearer resource_metadata URL when auth missing (RFC 9728)

'401'.description: Missing or invalid Bearer — WWW-Authenticate header present

post.summary: Invoke a single tool by name
Parse AI interview answer into enrichment signals

get.summary: Public platform-wide webhook delivery status (no auth, 60s cache)

Access-Control-Allow-Origin.description: Always '*' — no sensitive data in aggregate response

total_24h.description: Total webhook deliveries attempted across all tenants in the last 24h

success_rate.description: Fraction (0-1) of deliveries that returned 2xx or 4xx-ACK

avg_latency_ms.description: Mean round-trip latency (dispatch → subscriber 2xx) in ms

dlq_count.description: Current count of failed deliveries in the 7-day DLQ window

last_updated.description: Server-side ISO timestamp of the aggregate snapshot

'500'.description: status_unavailable (aggregation failed; UI falls back to "Elevated failure rate.")

post.summary: Request a new custom domain for the active org

responses.'200': { description: Domain added, status=pending, cname_target returned }

post.summary: Remove the org's custom domain (soft-delete + Vercel API DELETE)

get.summary: Poll current verification status (DNS + SSL)

properties.status: { type: string, enum: [pending, verifying, verified, failed] }
properties.verified_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }
properties.ssl_issued_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

get.summary: Get current tenant branding (falls back to MarkOS defaults)
List audit entries for the active tenant

responses.'400': { description: invite_not_found | invite_already_accepted | invite_withdrawn | invite_expired | invite_email_mismatch | seat_quota_reached | token_required }

tenant_role.enum: [owner, tenant-admin, manager, contributor, reviewer, billing-admin, readonly]

post.summary: Cancel an in-progress offboarding within the 30-day grace window

responses.'401': { description: unauthorised (missing or wrong cron secret) }

get.summary: Per-tool cost aggregation over last 24h for /settings/mcp breakdown section

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Cost breakdown aggregated from audit log within the last 24 hours.

get.summary: Active MCP sessions for tenant — tenant-admin visible

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Non-revoked MCP sessions scoped to tenant (token_hash NEVER echoed).

post.summary: Revoke an MCP session via /settings/mcp Revoke CTA

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

responses.'403': { description: Session belongs to a different tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }

get.summary: Current rolling-24h spend vs cap for session tenant (D-12 usage gauge backing)

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-org-id, in: header, required: false, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Usage snapshot for the session tenant.

get.summary: List tenant members with seat usage
List active sessions for the current user + tenant

post.summary: Revoke a single session OR all other sessions

responses.'404': { description: not_found (session does not belong to user/tenant) }

post.summary: Create a new tenant inside an existing org

'201'.description: Tenant created; caller added as owner

get.summary: List every org + tenant the current user belongs to
Surface 1 hero banner — 24h deliveries / success rate / avg latency / DLQ count

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Fleet metrics over the last 24h for the session's tenant.

schema.required: [tenant_id, total_24h, success_rate, avg_latency_ms, dlq_count, window_start, window_end]

get.summary: List active rotations for caller's tenant (Surface 4 grace banner)

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Active rotations with grace-window stage classification for S4 banner.

get.summary: Surface 1 subscriptions table — tenant-scoped list with rate_limit + breaker_state decoration

parameters.{ name: x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-org-id, in: header, required: false, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Decorated subscriptions — secret columns are never echoed (T-203-09-02).

items.required: [id, url, events, active, status_chip, breaker_state, rate_limit]

get.summary: Surface 2 detail endpoint — subscription + last-100 deliveries + DLQ count + RateLimitState + BreakerState + rotation

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-org-id, in: header, required: false, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Full subscription detail. Secret columns excluded.

responses.'403': { description: Subscription belongs to another tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }

post.summary: Surface 2 Danger-zone delete — soft-deletes subscription + cancels in-flight deliveries

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

post.summary: Replay a single failed webhook delivery (D-05 row-level Replay CTA)

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Replay enqueued — a new delivery row was inserted with replayed_from pointing at the original.

responses.'403': { description: Subscription belongs to another tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }
responses.'404': { description: Subscription or delivery not found }
responses.'409': { description: Delivery is not in status=failed (D-07 — replay only from DLQ) }

post.summary: Replay a batch of failed deliveries from the DLQ tab (D-05 checkbox + Replay)

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Batch replay enqueued — each replayed delivery_id carries a Vercel Queues idempotencyKey bucketed by 5-min windows (RESEARCH Pitfall 7).

responses.'403': { description: Subscription belongs to another tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Rotation started — secret_v2 populated, grace window opened for 30 days.

responses.'403': { description: Subscription belongs to another tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }
responses.'409': { description: Rotation already active for this subscription (rotation_already_active) }
responses.'429': { description: Rate-limited — 1 rotate per 5 minutes per tenant (rate_limited + Retry-After) }

post.summary: Rollback an active rotation — restore old secret (D-12 grace-window only)

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Rollback applied — secret_v2 discarded, grace columns nulled, rotation_state cleared.

responses.'403': { description: Subscription belongs to another tenant (cross_tenant_forbidden) }
responses.'409': { description: Past grace (past_grace) or no active rotation (rotation_not_active) — D-12 prevents post-grace restore }

post.summary: Surface 2 Settings save — url / events / rps_override with SSRF re-check + ceiling check

parameters.{ name: sub_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-user-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-tenant-id, in: header, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
x-markos-org-id, in: header, required: false, schema: { type: string } }

'200'.description: Subscription updated. Audit row emitted (source_domain=webhooks, action=subscription.updated).

post.summary: Score and persist identity stitch decisions for anonymous CRM history attachment

\"200\".description: Identity stitch decision stored with explicit decision state

\"400\".description: Missing known-record or anonymous identity inputs

\"401\".description: Hosted identify requests require tenant auth

\"403\".description: Tenant context conflict or project scope denial

post.summary: Ingest first-party tracked activity and normalize it into CRM-visible event families

\"401\".description: Missing tenant or hosted auth context where required

get.summary: Redirect a tracked campaign or affiliate entry while appending CRM-readable attribution evidence

\"302\".description: Redirect issued with preserved attribution parameters

\"400\".description: Missing valid destination and no usable fallback

get.summary: List subscriptions for the calling tenant

post.summary: Create a webhook subscription for the calling tenant
Enqueue a synthetic delivery against an existing subscription

skip_dispatch.description: When true, enqueue only (useful for smoke tests).

post.summary: Deactivate a subscription (retained for audit, active=false)

get.summary: Read system configuration

\"500\".description: Server error or Linear API error

get.summary: Consent page bootstrap (redirects to /oauth/consent when authenticated; /login when not)

parameters.{ name: client_id, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
redirect_uri, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uri } }
response_type, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string, enum: [code] } }
code_challenge, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
code_challenge_method, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string, enum: [S256] } }
scope, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
state, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
resource, in: query, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uri } }

post.summary: Approve consent → authorization_code redirect (D-07 tenant-bind at session)

schema.required: [state, target_tenant_id, csrf_token, client_id, redirect_uri, resource, scope, code_challenge, code_challenge_method]

post.summary: RFC 7591 Dynamic Client Registration (open per MCP spec)

properties.grant_types: { type: array, items: { type: string, enum: [authorization_code] } }
properties.response_types: { type: array, items: { type: string, enum: [code] } }

post.summary: RFC 7009 token revocation (anti-probing — always 200 for authenticated actor)

'200'.description: Revocation accepted (even for unknown tokens per RFC 7009 §2.2)
Opaque bearer token issued (no refresh_token per D-06)

get.summary: Get system health status

plan_tier.description: Subscription tenant's plan tier (D-13). Unknown tiers fall through to 'free' at dispatch for fail-closed safety.

ceiling_rps.description: Plan-tier RPS ceiling (free=10, team=60, enterprise=300). D-13 locked.

effective_rps.description: The actual per-sub RPS enforced at dispatch — min(override_rps || ceiling_rps, ceiling_rps).

override_rps.description: Per-sub override (rps_override column). Null when unset. Cannot exceed ceiling_rps — subscribe-time rejects with rps_override_exceeds_plan.

state.description: Circuit breaker state (Plan 203-08). closed = healthy; half-open = probing; open = all dispatches gated.

trips.description: Count of trips in the rolling window. Null before first trip.

probe_at.description: Next half-open probe timestamp (exponential backoff 30s → 1m → 2m → 5m → 10m, capped at 10m). Null outside half-open.

opened_at.description: Timestamp when the breaker last transitioned to 'open'. Null before first trip.

F_100_WebhookSubscriptionDetail.description: Plan 203-09 will mount the GET /api/tenant/webhooks/subscriptions/{sub_id} handler whose 200 body matches this shape (extending F-72 WebhookSubscription with rate_limit + breaker_state sub-objects).

secret.description: Optional caller-provided secret; auto-generated if omitted.

F_72_webhook_subscription_v1_WebhookSubs.required: [id, tenant_id, url, secret, events, active, created_at, updated_at]

properties.secret: { type: string, description: "V1 signing secret. Masked to last 8 chars in UI (UI-SPEC §Surface 2 Settings); never echoed in list/detail API responses during rotation." }

secret_v2.description: Phase 203 D-10 — dual-sign secret during 30-day grace window. Never echoed in API responses (hashed or masked to last 8 chars in UI). Null outside an active rotation.

rotation_state.description: Phase 203 D-09 — active during grace window; rolled_back after explicit D-12 rollback; null outside rotation.

grace_started_at.description: Phase 203 D-10 — rotation grace window start; null outside rotation.

grace_ends_at.description: Phase 203 D-10 — rotation grace window end (start + 30 days); null outside rotation. After grace closes the old secret is purged (D-12).

rps_override.description: Phase 203 D-13 — per-subscription RPS override. May only LOWER the plan-tier default; cannot exceed plan ceiling.

F_73_webhook_delivery_v1_WebhookDelivery.required: [id, subscription_id, tenant_id, event, payload, attempt, status, created_at, updated_at]

properties.next_retry_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

replayed_from.description: Original delivery_id if this row is a replay (null otherwise). Self-ref FK with on delete set null.

dlq_at.description: Timestamp set when delivery transitions to status=failed after the 24-attempt cap (D-07 terminal DLQ marker).

final_attempt.description: Final attempt counter at the moment the delivery was marked failed.

botIdToken.description: Vercel BotID pre-submit token issued client-side

properties.challenge_id: { type: string, description: 'Opaque id of the server-stored challenge' }

properties.last_used_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

properties.logo_url: { type: string, nullable: true, format: uri }
